reason: Paid search saturation detected. Neural optimizer triggered to explore alternative channel allocations.
belief: Current ROAS of 2.4 is suppressed by paid search saturation. Reallocating budget toward CTV and retail media is predicted to improve incrementality and overall ROAS.

scenario_a.label: Rebalance: shift paid search budget to CTV and retail media
scenario_a.rationale: Reducing paid search to address saturation. CTV expansion reaches new audience segments with strong view-through attribution. Retail media increase captures high-intent in-store shoppers.

scenario_b.label: Conservative: increase retail media only
scenario_b.rationale: Low-risk incremental spend in retail media. Does not address paid search saturation. Lift is modest and confidence is below threshold.

actionability.reason: Predicted ROAS lift of 0.063 does not meet minimum threshold of 0.08

scenario_c.label: Aggressive: maximum CTV expansion with broad audience targeting
scenario_c.rationale: Aggressive CTV expansion yields highest predicted ROAS but requires broad audience targeting that triggers audience policy risk. Cannot be actioned without policy exception.

actionability.reason: Audience policy risk is classified as high — scenario cannot be selected
